summary: Iteration 8 testing completed successfully. All new features verified: (1) 'Add Entry' button visible in My Weekly Timesheet section, (2) Add Entry form with Project/Phase cascading dropdowns, Planned/Actual hours, Notes fields working correctly, (3) Phase dropdown disabled until project selected, (4) POST /api/timesheets creates manual timesheet entries, (5) GET /api/users/me/resource now returns 'Don' resource via find_user_resource fallback (no longer returns 404), (6) Pre-fill button still functional alongside Add Entry.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with don@ddconsult.tech / Welcome123! (super_admin) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/users/me/resource returns 'Don' resource via find_user_resource fallback (ID: 698c7799eea263b28c2715b1)
Backend: GET /api/projects returns 14 projects, 12 Active with phases having valid UUIDs
Backend: POST /api/timesheets creates manual timesheet entry with correct variance calculation
Backend: POST /api/timesheets returns 400 when phase_id is missing (validation working)
Backend: GET /api/timesheets/my-week returns timesheets with project enrichment
Backend: POST /api/timesheets/auto-fill still works (Pre-fill functionality)
Backend: GET /api/resources returns 5 resources including 'Don'
Backend: GET /api/timesheet/can-update returns allowed:true on Thursday (Sydney time)
Frontend: Login page loads and authentication works
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 'My Weekly Timesheet' collapsible section
Frontend: 'Add Entry' button visible with data-testid='add-timesheet-entry-btn'
Frontend: 'Pre-fill' button still visible alongside Add Entry
Frontend: Add Entry form opens with data-testid='add-entry-form'
Frontend: Project dropdown with data-testid='add-entry-project-select' working
Frontend: Phase dropdown disabled with 'Select project first' placeholder initially
Frontend: Phase dropdown enabled after project selection
Frontend: Planned Hours, Actual Hours, Notes inputs working
Frontend: Add Entry submit button creates timesheet and shows success toast
Frontend: New timesheet entry appears in list with correct variance

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Add Entry form elements found and functioning, form submission successful)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 test timesheet entries for ASKDD Chatbot project with 'TEST_' prefix in notes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 Add Entry feature fully tested and working. Key test IDs: add-timesheet-entry-btn, add-entry-form, add-entry-project-select, add-entry-phase-select, add-entry-planned-hours, add-entry-actual-hours, add-entry-notes, add-entry-submit. The find_user_resource fallback in GET /api/users/me/resource matches 'Don' resource via email prefix (don@ddconsult.tech -> 'Don'). Test file at /app/tests/test_iteration8_add_timesheet_entry.py can be reused for regression testing.

add_entry_button.location: Dashboard > My Weekly Timesheet section header

cascading_dropdown.description: Phase dropdown disabled until project selected, shows 'Select project first' placeholder

api_endpoint_fixed.description: Now uses find_user_resource fallback - matches Don resource via email prefix matching

prefill_button.description: Pre-fill button exists alongside Add Entry
